description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, featuring large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The house includes a visible garage door on the ground floor, multiple balconies, and an open terrace area with outdoor seating. The interior is partially visible, revealing distinct rooms with colored accent walls, including a kitchen, dining area, and living spaces. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass windows and metal railings on the balconies. The overall design is functional and urban, suitable for a city neighborhood.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, balconies, and a light-colored facade. Features include a garage, open terrace, and visible interior rooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, main entry, and large windows with a glimpse into the interior living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open terrace with outdoor seating, kitchen area, and additional windows and balconies.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balconies, more windows, and a clear view of the flat roof and upper rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional balconies, windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with double doors, no porch, and a large garage door integrated into the facade.
